name: Arthur

skills.name: Holy Vanguard
skills.description: Invokes the protection of the divine light to recover Health continuously. If Movement Speed is impaired, the Health restored is doubled.

skills.name: Valiant Charge
skills.description: Enhances the next Basic Attack into a dash, dealing extra damage and silencing enemies.

skills.name: Whirling Strike
skills.description: Deals damage over time to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Might of Excalibur
skills.description: Jumps to the target enemy hero to deal damage. Launches all heroes within range.

skillsZh.name: 聖光守護
skillsZh.description: 獲得聖光守護，持續回復生命值。當移速受損時，【聖光守護】回復效果加倍。

skillsZh.name: 誓約之盾
skillsZh.description: 強化下次普攻，具有突進效果，造成額外傷害和沉默效果。

skillsZh.name: 迴旋打擊
skillsZh.description: 對自身周圍一定範圍內的敵人造成持續傷害。

skillsZh.name: 聖劍裁決
skillsZh.description: 跳向目標敵方英雄，對目標造成傷害並擊飛範圍內所有英雄。

tips: Build: Frigid Charge, Ominous Premonition, Spikemail.
tipsZh: 亞瑟（對抗路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.15%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：冰霜衝擊、不祥徵兆、反傷刺甲.

patchHistory.change: Increased Health recovery and skill damage
Reduced Skill 1 cooldown, adjusted damage structure.
patchHistory.detail: "Arthur's mobility and the silence effect on his Skill 1 are crucial for his playstyle. The initial cooldown of this skill has been a bit too long, so we're reducing it to give Arthur more flexibility in skill upgrades."

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升生命值回復和技能傷害
降低1技能冷卻，調整傷害結構
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「1技能加速效果關乎亞瑟的機動性，沉默效果也能夠對敵人形成一定的限制；目前1技能的初始冷卻時間有點太長了，因此我們適當降低前期的冷卻時間，讓亞瑟在技能升級的選擇上有更多靈活性。」

faqs.question: Is Arthur good in current season?
faqs.answer: Arthur is Tier A Tank with 50.15% win rate, 1.21% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Arthur build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Frigid Charge, Ominous Premonition, Spikemail, Succubus Cloak, Ravage - Phantom, Amble - Winter.

faqs.question: How to counter Arthur?
faqs.answer: Pick Xiang Yu, Lady Sun. Strong into Han Xin, Arke.

faqsZh.question: 亞瑟 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 亞瑟 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.15%、選取 1.21%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 亞瑟 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：冰霜衝擊、不祥徵兆、反傷刺甲、魔女斗篷、侵略・怒魂、徐行・凜冬.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 亞瑟？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Xiang Yu、Lady Sun。亞瑟 克制 Han Xin、Arke。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Han Xin, Arke. Weak into: Xiang Yu, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Han Xin、Arke；被克制：Xiang Yu、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Arthur is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 50.5% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Arthur: Invokes the protection of the divine light to recover Health continuously.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Frostscar's Embrace, then complete Glacial Buckler, Eye of the Phoenix, Cuirass of Savagery. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Arthur's Tank kit. Take Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Valiant Charge → Whirling Strike → Might of Excalibur → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Might of Excalibur (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Valiant Charge, and Might of Excalibur on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Valiant Charge → Whirling Strike → Might of Excalibur → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Arthur is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Arthur.
comparisons: Arthur vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Arthur when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Arthur vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 1.7% more often globally. Choose Arthur when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Arthur excels into Han Xin, Arke. Avoid blind picking into Xiang Yu, Lady Sun without team peel.
